sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30101" key="e)gkaloskelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκᾱλοσκελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦς</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n30101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having his legs in the stocks, Com. Adesp.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">988</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
